历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 4719 → 4102 → 5890 → 5818 → 5663. Rankings moved forward from 2021 to 2022 (increased competition), significantly shifted back to 5890 in 2023 (decreased competition), and slightly adjusted back to 5663 in 2024–2025; the fluctuation range in the past 3 years is about 4102–5890, with a baseline of approximately 5663 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jilin Province: 79 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 81 in 2023, 86 in 2024, 79 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 80, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 1.3%, having minimal impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 22nd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings main list, stable in the 21–22 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to lingering public opinion from the 2019 study partner incident; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting relatively high attention for applications; there was an admission gap in Shaanxi in 2022, a drop of 6414 places in journalism and communication majors in 2023, and relatively low admission scores in 2024, indicating historical abnormal signals but not systematic; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 19 disciplines rated A- or above: Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, and A- disciplines including Clinical Medicine, Civil Engineering, Basic Medicine, Business Administration, Applied Economics, Materials Science and Engineering, Law, Physics, Environmental Science and Engineering, Biology, Electrical Engineering, Archaeology, Pharmacy, Software Engineering, etc.; Mathematics A+ is the top science discipline, with strong clinical medicine and computer-related disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shandong University's advantageous majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have maintained high to very high social popularity from 2024 to 2026; the total number of Jilin Province college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 110,868, with an estimated physics category of about 79,970 based on recent history/physics ratios, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 80,421 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition; Shandong University is located in Jinan City, Shandong Province, recruiting across provinces from Jilin; in 2025, it enrolled 79 science students in Jilin, accounting for a small proportion of the university's national enrollment plan, making it an out-of-province recruitment with no significant regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5663, a slight enrollment increase of 1 in 2026 (expansion rate of about 1.3%), a slight decrease of about 0.6% in Jilin physics category candidates, stable university level (Soft Science 22nd), slightly negative reputation but high Douyin heat, strong advantageous disciplines, and other factors, with a slight decrease in total candidates and the university's comprehensive appeal, a small forward adjustment of 50 places is made; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5656, with a range of 5156–6156.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 5156), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 6156), it is recommended to mainly choose stable Tier 2 majors, with Tier 3 as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 747, 829, 736, 880, and 960 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating and backward trend: from 2021 to 2022, it moved back from 747 to 829; in 2023, it slightly advanced to 736; from 2024 to 2025, it continued to move back to 880 and then 960; over the past three years, it has cumulatively moved back by about 224 places, with a baseline of approximately 960 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Jilin Province: 17 students in 2021, 22 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 27 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 26 students, a decrease of 1 student compared to 2025, a reduction of about 3.7%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 22nd in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of national universities; its reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to the lingering public opinion from the 2019 study partner incident; it ranks 20th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure; in 2023, the ranking of journalism and communication majors dropped by 6414 places, and liberal arts-related majors were significantly affected by public opinion; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, with advantageous liberal arts disciplines including Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, as well as Law A-, Archaeology A-, etc.; Mathematics A+ is the strongest discipline in the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular to recommended, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of examinees for the 2026 Jilin Province college entrance examination is approximately 110,868, with an estimated history category of about 30,900 based on the recent ratio of history to science categories, which is basically flat compared to the 31,071 history category examinees in 2025; Shandong University is located in Jinan City, Shandong Province, and recruits across provinces from Jilin Province; in 2025, it enrolled 27 liberal arts students in Jilin Province, a relatively small proportion, indicating cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 960, a reduction of 1 student in 2026 (a decrease of about 3.7%), the basically flat number of history category examinees in Jilin Province, the recent trend of continuous backward movement in rankings, the somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin popularity, and other factors, taking into account the enrollment reduction and the trend of backward movement, a small correction of 30 places backward is made; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 969, with a range of 831 to 1107.
